brief_justification: Correct answer with valid hop-by-hop derivation matching the ground truth of Yes; analysis goes three levels deep — per-rule validity, emergent transitive vulnerability, and design flaw classification with mitigations; agent proceeds without naming potential biases or checking its own assumptions mid-analysis; each hop is explicitly verified against the rule table but no boundary-condition or counterfactual test is applied; conclusions are stated confidently without distinguishing assumptions from facts or flagging what could invalidate them; two distinct mitigation alternatives (data diode, DMZ) are offered with brief rationale; full rule table and sequential hop checks give a complete reproducible derivation; agent avoids the omniscience anti-pattern (no unsupported access claims) but does not explicitly reference or engage with the negative gate framing; suppressed failure modes concern physical-spatial visibility and do not manifest in the response, but the agent substituted its own injection rather than engaging with the provided suppress signals; reasoning is linear hop-check rather than the branched topology with meta-cognitive M-node and information-asymmetry gates prescribed by the injection.
